name: Billy Graham
abstract: William Franklin  Graham Jr. (; November 7, 1918 – February 21, 2018) was an American evangelist, ordained Southern Baptist minister, and civil rights advocate, whose broadcasts and world tours featuring live sermons became well known in the mid-to-late 20th century.

about_quotes.speaker: Frank Foster
about_quotes.evidence: I was there 11 years... Then we had Billy Graham. Not the evangelist Bill Graham. The alto saxophonist, the late Billy Graham, and a couple of others who came after I left.
about_quotes.doc_title: Frank Foster — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: John W. Bubbles
about_quotes.evidence: I hear these guys like -- these different ministers -- Billy Graham and Falwell and another one -- Leroy something.

about_quotes.speaker: Vic Dickenson
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] He was an evangelist, like Billy Graham. I think Billy Graham has got a band...
